universal_monster_ability.name: Low-Light Vision
universal_monster_ability.text: The monster can see in dim light as though it were bright light, so it ignores the concealed condition due to dim light.

changes.text: - Replace the human trait with the tripkee trait.

name: Tripkee
text: Tripkees are often cautious, but their cunning and creativity usually lends them success. While they try to avoid direct conflict, a tripkee will fiercely protect their home or community when cornered.
